This is a high-visibility, high-</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">veloci</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">ty</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">&nbsp;engagement with a client that is serious about AI transformation and committed to moving&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">fast</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">.</span></span>&nbsp;<br>&nbsp;<br><span data-contrast="auto"><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">The pod operates as both a&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">delivery</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">&nbsp;unit and a reference model. The practices,&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">sprint</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">&nbsp;rhythms, and operating patterns established here become the&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">blueprint</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">&nbsp;the university replicates as it scales AI across the institution.</span></span>&nbsp;<br>&nbsp;<br><span data-contrast="auto"><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">We are looking for an experienced&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">Delivery</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">Lead</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">&nbsp;to keep the pod&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">focus</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">ed, moving, and&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">accou</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">ntab</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">l</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">e.
